# Maximo Delivery Automation Workbench

Public static marketing site for the Maximo Delivery Automation Workbench and MAS9 Power fictional demo tenant.

Primary pages:
- https://softwarecomparereview.github.io/masready/
- https://softwarecomparereview.github.io/masready/mas9-power.html
- https://softwarecomparereview.github.io/masready/features.html
- https://softwarecomparereview.github.io/masready/trust.html
- https://softwarecomparereview.github.io/masready/architecture.html

Safety notes:
- MAS9 Power data is fictional and seeded for demonstration.
- License usage planning is not legal/compliance advice.
- Product posture is review-only: no SQL execution, no Maximo mutation, no Jira mutation.
